title: Hand-Painted Ceramic Spice Jar Set (4 Piece)
shortDescription: Four glazed ceramic jars with airtight bamboo lids.
description: Four 300ml ceramic jars, glazed and hand-painted, each with an airtight bamboo lid to keep spices fresh. Dishwasher safe on the top rack; hand wash recommended to preserve the painted finish.
